senses.gloss: to shorten, to clip, to curtail
to cut off, to clip off
to strike out, to cross out
to elide, to apocopate, to drop by apheresis

examples.text: حَذْفُ الْكَلِمَاتِ الْمُفْتَاحِيَّةِ الْآنِيَّةِ إِلْزَامِيٌّ عِنْدَمَا يَتَعَلَّقُ الْأَمْرُ بِخُصُوصِيَّةِ الْمَرْءِ.
examples.english: It's mandatory to delete real-time keywords regarding one's privacy.

senses.gloss: to give shape, to cut, clip, or trim into proper shape
cancellation, crossing out, deletion, omission, dropping, suppression
teal (some birds in the genus Anas)

etymology.text:
Verb form I from the root ح ذ ف (ḥ ḏ f).

Verb form II from the root ح ذ ف (ḥ ḏ f).

Verbal noun from حَذَفَ (ḥaḏafa).

From the root ح ذ ف (ḥ ḏ f) in the sense of "trimming (especially laterally)", from the تَحْذِيفُ الشَّعَر (taḥḏīfu š-šaʕar, “undercut hairstyle”); so called for the distinctive teal-colored side patches on the bird's head.
